title: Fix For Her page: category circle image sync and body background color

requirements.text: Fix the sliding product category circles on the For Her page (GirlsHomePage) so that when an image is uploaded via the admin panel (HeaderCategoryNavManagement), the circle displays the uploaded image instead of falling back to the emoji/icon. The component should fetch category header data from the backend (same pattern as BoysHomePage uses for boys headers) and render the uploaded image when available, showing the icon only as a true fallback when no image has been uploaded.

quotes: the sliding product category circles in For Her page are not syncing images when uploaded from admin control. It shows icons.

acceptanceCriteria: When an image is uploaded for a girls category via the admin panel, the corresponding circle on the For Her page displays that image.
The circle uses the same data-fetching approach as BoysHomePage (fetching category header nav data from the backend).
If no image has been uploaded for a category, the circle falls back to the emoji/icon as before.
Image updates in the admin panel are reflected on the For Her page without requiring a full page reload (React Query cache invalidation).

requirements.text: Fix the body background color of the For Her page (GirlsHomePage) to match the background color used on all other customer-facing pages. Only the page body background should be changed — the header and footer styling must remain unaffected.

quotes: the page body colour of For Her page has become off-white, change it to as in other pages, only the body not header or footer.

acceptanceCriteria: The For Her page body background color matches the background color of other customer-facing pages (e.g., HomePage, BoysHomePage).
The header and footer background colors on the For Her page are unchanged.
No off-white or differing background tint is visible in the page body area on the For Her page.

constraints: Do not modify frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or any files under frontend/src/components/ui.
Only change the body background of GirlsHomePage — header and footer styling must not be affected.
nonGoals: Changes to the Boys (For Him) page category circles or layout.
Changes to admin panel image upload logic.
Any backend schema or data model changes.
Modifying the header or footer styling on any page.
